Liana Barrientos, 39, has been accused of marrying ten men in an immigration scam. She faces two criminal counts of offering a false instrument for filing in the first degree and could face up to four years in prison if convicted. Barrientos' marriages took place between 1999 and 2002, mostly in Westchester County, Long Island, New Jersey, and the Bronx. Following poor performance in its international engagements, "Grace of Monaco", the critically-panned film starring Nicole Kidman as Grace Kelly, is heading straight to Lifetime. The Weinstein Co., which first purchased U.S. distribution rights at the 2013 Berlin Film Festival, decided to sell it directly to Lifetime rather than book it into U.S. theatres. The film will premiere on Lifetime on Memorial Day, May 25. The movie was originally scheduled for release in late 2013, and was considered a potential Oscar contender.

The film "Grace of Monaco" starring Nicole Kidman will be premiering on Lifetime on May 25th, skipping a theatrical release. The film, which received negative reviews, was originally scheduled for release in late 2013 but faced multiple delays. The Weinstein Co., the distributor, decided to sell the film to Lifetime after it performed poorly internationally. The director of the film, Olivier Dahan, had disagreements with Harvey Weinstein over the final cut of the movie. Despite the film's star-studded cast and potential for awards, it was ultimately not released in theaters and will now premiere on Lifetime.

text: "Grace of Monaco," starring Nicole Kidman, is set to premiere on Lifetime on May 25 after performing poorly in its international engagements. The film, directed by Olivier Dahan, was originally scheduled for release in late 2013 and was intended for the Academy Awards. However, The Weinstein Company (TWC) pulled it out of awards contention and delayed its release. Dahan criticized TWC for tampering with his final cut of the film, while Grace's children called the movie "glamorized and inaccurate." Despite this, TWC struck a new distribution deal for the film at the 2015 Cannes Film Festival and showed Dahan's cut in the US. However, the movie was not included in TWC's fall 2015 release schedule.

text: The first six "Star Wars" movies will be available in digital HD on Friday, featuring behind-the-scenes content and a focus on sound effects. The collection also introduces the Star Wars universe's first gay character.

"Star Wars" movies will be available for digital download for the first time, including special features that give fans a behind-the-scenes look at the sound effects, including those made by the Geonosians. The films also introduce the franchise's first gay character.
